title: Data Analyst
jd_text: We are looking for a Data Analyst with 2+ years of experience. Must be proficient in SQL, Python, and Excel. Experience with Power BI or Tableau is a plus. Strong analytical skills and problem-solving abilities.

title: Python Developer
jd_text: Seeking a backend Python Developer with 3+ years of experience. Must have strong skills in Python, Django, or Flask. Knowledge of AWS and Docker is required. Good to have React or Next.js.
